name: Hina Nanda
text: Andri is a nice person a very dedicated and helpful person he helped us for free though we were not knowing Bhasha being foreigner . He’s a wonderful human being .Thankyou Andri god bless you !🙌🏻👍🏻
textTranslated: Andri adalah orang yang baik, sangat berdedikasi dan suka membantu. Dia membantu kami secara cuma-cuma meskipun kami tidak mengenal Bhasha karena kami orang asing. Dia adalah manusia yang luar biasa. Terima kasih Andri, semoga Tuhan memberkatimu! 🙌🏻👍🏻
responseFromOwnerText:
Hello Ms Hina,

Thanking you from the bottom of our hearts for taking the time to write this.

To be honest, Andri is just as wonderful behind the scenes, and we are so lucky to have him on our team. It can be so overwhelming to be in a new country when you don't speak the language, so we're just so glad he could step in and make things a little easier for you. We always want our shop to feel like a safe and welcoming space for absolutely everyone.

We will definitely share this with Andri, your kind words and blessings will mean the absolute world to him.

Sending you our best wishes and lots of gratitude!

Take care,
The Team at Optikal Bahari
address: Jl. Bend. Jago No.447, RT.15/RW.1, Utan Panjang, Kec. Kemayoran, Kota Jakarta Pusat, Daerah Khusus Ibukota Jakarta 10650, Indonesia
title: Optikal Bahari (Sejak 1978) Optik Terdekat Rekomendasi Untuk Anda
